notableEvents.label: Trevor Story GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story grounds into a double play, shortstop Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Trevor Story out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Story reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Hao-Yu Lee.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Jarren Duran scores. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Jarren Duran scores. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Hao-Yu Lee.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Hao-Yu Lee.

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene flies out to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Dillon Dingler to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
